phases.name: Architecture blueprint
phases.objective: Convert requirements into module boundaries, invariants, risk register, and implementation slices for the candidate.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Contracts and slices
phases.objective: Produce task contracts, proof commands, fixture strategy, and independent slices that can be claimed in parallel.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Docs, release, and operations
phases.objective: Produce docs, CI gates, migration notes, release checklist, and operational runbooks for shipping the candidate.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Final signoff
phases.objective: Aggregate receipts, rerun full proofs, ensure clean tree, and require final human approval before promotion.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Hardening and security
phases.objective: Run fuzzing, stress, recovery, race, security, and fault-injection proof lanes against the candidate.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Integration fusion
phases.objective: Fuse verified subsystem work, resolve interface drift, and run integration proof lanes on the integration branch.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Parallel subsystems
phases.objective: Implement independent verified slices in isolated worktrees with critic lanes, against the canonical contracts.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Parity gap closure
phases.objective: Close blocking parity gaps using the gap ledger and regression proofs so the candidate matches the target on the acceptance matrix.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Parity lab
phases.objective: Create differential, golden, metamorphic, and fuzz parity harnesses comparing the candidate against the redis target.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Performance closure
phases.objective: Benchmark redis (reference) versus the candidate and close hot-path gaps without weakening parity.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Repo graph bootstrap
phases.objective: Index functions, symbols, tests, call edges, dataflow hints, ownership, and blast radius so later phases edit with full context.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase

phases.name: Source of truth
phases.objective: Build the non-negotiable behavior, API, compatibility, and evidence ledger for the target (redis) so every later phase can prove against it.
phases.summary: scaffold-mode: per-phase invocation deferred until --live wires the jankurai-runner subprocess for this phase
